visual_description: A man in a light shirt and headphones looks down at a computer monitor. The view then shows a blue digital map with grid lines and Chinese characters. The scene shifts to a dim hallway where two men, one holding a gun, move forward, and a man in a suit stands before a wall marked with Chinese characters.
